## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Dimmo and GrowthX to align on SEO strategy and content development approach.](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dimmo's primary goal: Significantly increase organic traffic (10-20x current levels) focused on sales tech audience](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Content strategy to leverage unique demo video content and enrich product pages](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop comprehensive SEO plan, balancing programmatic content with high-value, intent-focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)
  - [Collaboration model: Async-first with GrowthX taking lead on content production after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Dimmo's Current Traffic and Goals

  - [\~500-1000 monthly organic visitors currently, mostly branded search](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aiming for 250k unique visitors, primarily from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Focus on sales tech companies and salespeople as target audience](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [\~5% conversion rate (8k signups from 150k visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Content Strategy and Opportunities

  - [Leverage unique demo video content for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
  - [Enrich product pages with comprehensive info (features, pricing, use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Explore programmatic content opportunities (e.g., niche "top 10" lists)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
  - [Balance SEO-driven content with genuinely useful, intent-focused pieces](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Potential to use demo transcripts for feature-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2158.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Structure

  - [Immediate need to optimize product pages (e.g., including "demo" in titles)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3066.0)
  - [Develop internal linking strategy to connect programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Implement search functionality within product demo videos](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Primary competitor: G2](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3112.0)
  - [Other review sites and "audience competitors" to be considered](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3119.0)
  - [ProductHunt as potential model (not direct competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3108.0)

### GrowthX Approach and Timeline

  - [Week 1-2: Deep research, develop content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2831.0)
  - [Week 3-4: Begin content production, iterate based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3274.0)
  - [Aim for scaled content production by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)
  - [Utilize shared Notion workspace and Slack channel for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dimmo to provide access to analytics, search console, and any relevant documentation](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3207.0)
  - [Dimmo to share previous SEO agency's work to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3349.0)
  - [Dimmo to prioritize product page updates (layout changes within days, more complex features TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2962.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with comprehensive list of required access/materials](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
  - [Next meeting: Review initial research, content opportunities, and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/rFJG_yzaLshSn2FrBLj8fU6sHrax91sZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)
